creator: elbarto@megadrive.org
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of emulators/sdlmame,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/133019 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133019
> 

  I don't agree with those patches, according to pav@ MAKE_JOBS_SAFE 
must be declared after dependency declarations.
PR for sdlmame and sdlmess are submitted (ports/133042 and ports/133043)


-- 
Emmanuel Vadot
